texto: Guess what? “Someday” almost never comes around. It gets lost somewhere between the shouda, woulda, couldas of your life. Let go of whatever is holding you back and dare to live – boldly, bravely, and courageously - now. Remember, none of these elements mean you have to be fearless. It’s absolutely okay to be afraid! Acknowledge that part of yourself and then push beyond that fear, whatever it may be. I’m not brave. . . . I’m just taking every opportunity to LIVE.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Kendra Thomas que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Guess what? “Someday” almost never comes around. It gets lost somewhere between the shouda, would…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre coragem, bold, boldly, com foco em inspiracao e boldly.
